Investors

 

Investors

"Best Overall Investor Relations" – IR Magazine

TSMC Shares Are an Attractive Investment for Semiconductor Innovations
A World Leading Semiconductor Foundry
Pioneered the dedicated semiconductor foundry business model, enabled fabless IC design industry to flourish and unleashed innovations with all Logic IC designers
Built the world's largest semiconductor design ecosystem, 
Open Innovation Platform
®
, and collaborated with its customers/partners to form the most powerful force of semiconductor innovations – about 85% of worldwide semiconductor start-up product prototypes were enabled by TSMC
Produced 12,682 different products using 305 different process technologies to serve hundreds of customers with the 
world's largest logic capacity
 of >17 million 12"-equivalent wafers in 2025
Excellent Financial Performance
The only foundry that consistently delivers 
excellent financial results
. Delivered 18.6% revenue CAGR and 18.7% earnings CAGR since listing in 1994
Strategic financial objectives (2024 to 2029): (1) revenue CAGR to approach 25% in U.S. dollar terms; (2) gross margin to be 56% and higher and ROE to be high-20s% through the cycle
Fortress balance sheet
 with semiconductor industry's 
highest credit rating
 (S&P: AA-, Moody's Aa3)
Have relied only on internally generated funds to finance organic growth
Highly disciplined in mergers and acquisitions
Commit to Sustainable Cash Dividends and Paid US$15.0bn in 2025
Started paying 
cash dividends
 from 2004, and have never reduced dividend per share
Committed to sustainable cash dividends on both annual and quarterly basis
An Ethical Company with Integrity
Core values
 of Integrity, Commitment, Innovation, and Customer Trust (ICIC)
Management follow 10 
business philosophy
Sustainability Leader
Actively fulfill 
corporate social responsibilities
 and develop 
positive relationships with all stakeholders
 including employees, shareholders, customers, suppliers, and society
Set our sustainability focuses on driving  
green manufacturing
, building a 
responsible supply chain
, creating an 
inclusive workplace, developing talent
, and 
caring for the underprivileged
Included in the Dow Jones Sustainability Indices (DJSI) for 24 consecutive years in 2024; received a rating of "Low ESG Risk" from the Sustainalytics ESG Risk Ratings; included in both MSCI ESG Leaders Indexes/SRI Indexes (with “AAA” rating) and FTSE4Good All-world index/Emerging Index/TIP Taiwan ESG Index; awarded ISS ESG's “Prime” status in the ESG Corporate Rating; membership in the Corporate Knights & As You Sow Carbon Clean 200
TM
 List for 2024; awarded “The Most Prestigious Sustainability Award - Top Ten Domestic Corporate” by Taiwan Institute for Sustainable Energy for 9th conservative years
Trinity of Strengths Enables TSMC to be Everyone's Foundry
Lead in 
technology
, 
manufacturing excellence
 and customers' trust, which enable the Company to be everyone's foundry

  1. Home
  2. Investors

Investors

"Best Overall Investor Relations" – IR Magazine

TSMC Shares Are an Attractive Investment for Semiconductor Innovations

A World Leading Semiconductor Foundry

  • Pioneered the dedicated semiconductor foundry business model, enabled fabless IC design industry to flourish and unleashed innovations with all Logic IC designers
  • Built the world's largest semiconductor design ecosystem, Open Innovation Platform®, and collaborated with its customers/partners to form the most powerful force of semiconductor innovations – about 85% of worldwide semiconductor start-up product prototypes were enabled by TSMC
  • Produced 12,682 different products using 305 different process technologies to serve hundreds of customers with the world's largest logic capacity of >17 million 12"-equivalent wafers in 2025

Excellent Financial Performance

  • The only foundry that consistently delivers excellent financial results. Delivered 18.6% revenue CAGR and 18.7% earnings CAGR since listing in 1994
  • Strategic financial objectives (2024 to 2029): (1) revenue CAGR to approach 25% in U.S. dollar terms; (2) gross margin to be 56% and higher and ROE to be high-20s% through the cycle
  • Fortress balance sheet with semiconductor industry's highest credit rating (S&P: AA-, Moody's Aa3)
  • Have relied only on internally generated funds to finance organic growth
  • Highly disciplined in mergers and acquisitions

Commit to Sustainable Cash Dividends and Paid US$15.0bn in 2025

  • Started paying cash dividends from 2004, and have never reduced dividend per share
  • Committed to sustainable cash dividends on both annual and quarterly basis

An Ethical Company with Integrity

  • Core values of Integrity, Commitment, Innovation, and Customer Trust (ICIC)
  • Management follow 10 business philosophy

Sustainability Leader

  • Actively fulfill corporate social responsibilities and develop positive relationships with all stakeholders including employees, shareholders, customers, suppliers, and society
  • Set our sustainability focuses on driving  green manufacturing, building a responsible supply chain, creating an inclusive workplace, developing talent, and caring for the underprivileged
  • Included in the Dow Jones Sustainability Indices (DJSI) for 24 consecutive years in 2024; received a rating of "Low ESG Risk" from the Sustainalytics ESG Risk Ratings; included in both MSCI ESG Leaders Indexes/SRI Indexes (with “AAA” rating) and FTSE4Good All-world index/Emerging Index/TIP Taiwan ESG Index; awarded ISS ESG's “Prime” status in the ESG Corporate Rating; membership in the Corporate Knights & As You Sow Carbon Clean 200TM List for 2024; awarded “The Most Prestigious Sustainability Award - Top Ten Domestic Corporate” by Taiwan Institute for Sustainable Energy for 9th conservative years

Trinity of Strengths Enables TSMC to be Everyone's Foundry

  • Lead in technology, manufacturing excellence and customers' trust, which enable the Company to be everyone's foundry
